title: Plastic Waste Management Market Set to Soar Past USD 43.32 Billion by 2030 | Skyquest Technology
text: Efforts to manage plastic waste, encompassing collection, recycling, incineration, and landfill disposal, drive growth in a dynamic market. Diverse polymers like PP, LDPE, HDPE, PVC, PUR, and PET emerge from residential, commercial, and industrial sources. These materials serve packaging, textiles, consumer goods, transport, construction, and electronics sectors. Anticipating industry trends from 2023 to 2030 reveals a complex landscape of opportunities.
